name: ultimateclasslimo.com
message: [AI generated] Ultimate Class Limo is a professional transportation company based in New York. It offers a wide collection of luxury vehicles like limousines, buses, vans, SUVs and cars for various events. Its services range from corporate transport and airport transfers to special events like weddings, proms, and tours. With professionally trained drivers and quality service, it prioritises comfort and safety. It also provides customised travel solutions based on clients' individual needs.
